catalogData.name: The Mind
properties: Unphased (can't gain Frightened or Wounded status)

powers.name: Connected Mind
powers.raw: Connected Mind (Complex Action, Trait): Cast Mindlink at Force. Sprit can target people you know. Does not use service.
powers.text: Cast Mindlink at Force. Sprit can target people you know. Does not use service.

powers.name: Animal Form
powers.raw: Animal Form (Major Action, Sustained): Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.
powers.text: Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.

powers.name: Cloud Mind
powers.raw: Cloud Mind (Complex Action): Cast Confusion at Force. Can't target same person twice.
powers.text: Cast Confusion at Force. Can't target same person twice.

powers.name: Enhance Acuity
powers.raw: Enhance Acuity (Complex Action, Sustained): Cast Enlighten at Force, but can't target self
powers.text: Cast Enlighten at Force, but can't target self

powers.name: Primary Spell
powers.raw: Primary Spell (Complex Action, Sustained): Cast Mind Probe or Mind Spike at Force
powers.text: Cast Mind Probe or Mind Spike at Force

powers.name: Skill Guidance
powers.raw: Skill Guidance (Complex Action, Sustained): Target gains +2 augmentation bonus to Engineering if unaugmented skill ≤ Force
powers.text: Target gains +2 augmentation bonus to Engineering if unaugmented skill ≤ Force

greatFormPowers.name: Knowing Mind
greatFormPowers.raw: Knowing Mind (Complex Action, Sustained): Use Remote Sensing in 1 Complex Action at no cost or cast any Detection spell at Force
greatFormPowers.text: Use Remote Sensing in 1 Complex Action at no cost or cast any Detection spell at Force
